generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulationSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor providing prerecorded simulation data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulationDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SimulationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationSource
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurement data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance AnemometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance VirtualMachineImagesDataset : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Pre-recorded datasets for simulation and installation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Docker
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoisting movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Used for container pickup at the hoist end"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment for lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization and monitoring tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for IoT communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SolidWorks : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for creating and maintaining 3D models of physical crane components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ActiveMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model for self-adaptive control of the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Docker, InfluxDB
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization of the digital twin system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides optimal control capabilities for the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical operational data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables interactive monitoring and visualization of crane system data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs continuous validation of the digital twin against physical system"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of air quality data for virus spread prevention"
]

instance SimulationCapability : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation of virus spread scenarios based on air quality data"
]

instance PredictionCapability : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis for virus spread based on air quality trends"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts motor controllers to optimize crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for analysis and trends"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of operational data"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results for system evolution and fault detection"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program collecting data from physical crane"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application for continuously logging data into TimescaleDB"
]

instance AdHocDevelopmentProcess : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc development approach without commercial digital twin framework"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Human Machine Interface (HMI) are processed by the Control Application (Python), which uses the Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmations are not detailed in the document."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations against an acceptable threshold, with references to publications on continuous validation methods."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is used for signaling between digital twin services (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation). TimescaleDB and Grafana are utilized for data storage and visualization. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system runs all software on a personal computer with containers implemented using Docker. Computational and storage requirements are not explicitly specified, and scalability or cloud deployment details are not mentioned in the document."
]
